name: Jettomero: Hero of the Universe
short_description: Play as Jettomero, a giant, indestructible, and incredibly clumsy robot determined to save the human race. Explore a procedurally generated universe by flying through space and landing on planets while trying not to destroy everything in your path.
detailed_description:
This game has been removed from Steam by the developer in protest of Valve's hands-off approach to dealing with toxic and hateful communities on this platform. Video games have fostered an extremely problematic sub-culture and it is this industry's responsibility to do everything it can to tackle this problem.

Jettomero is available elsewhere if you would still like to play.

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Italian, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Danish, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Ukrainian, Czech, Finnish
